item.title: SIDS cause discovered
item.description: Update - not so robust unfortunately :( pls see below updates from more knowledgable imgurians https://twitter.com/coldoneder/status/1524941362411479043?s=21&t=LMmz4lOZmWqwlpFjnhuWvA not as promising as seemed. thanks to @sandbagfun1 https://www.theverge.com/2022/5/13/23071364/sids-research-hype-science-studies thanks @pickledonions Dr. Harrington and her research team seems to have discovered the cause for Sudden Infant Deatch Syndrome. Basically an enzyme level is the key. If it is lower, the infant is in danger of dying in its sleep. She lost her son 29 years ago to SIDS and dedicated her life so other parents don’t have to go through that ordeal. https://www.biospace.com/article/researchers-answer-how-and-why-infants-die-from-sids/?fbclid=IwAR02u52oIFifO7UfKY5U9wvvgN8lx5uSCq7OPhgjlq9M8iOMya3UzSUevlU #womeninscience #sids #science
item.dc:creator: pappadera

item.title: Using a cross walk
item.description: Officer asked if my clothing made me less visible. It was sunny, I was on the cross walk, I looked both ways before crossing. He asked me if my stammering was due to drugs and alcohol, I was in pain and terrified. Please, good ones who exist, please try to push through.
item.dc:creator: yappledaple

item.title: Saturday Morning Animal Dump
item.dc:creator: Llamadanceparty3000

item.title: Hours of daylight as a function of latitude and and time visually represented.
item.description: Interesting way to see the solstice happen. Wanted to share this cool infographic, so here it is. Have a good weekend. As a 'TLDR' post script: the prime meridian is the 'up and down' line in the middle of the picture. Before '72 and atomic clocks, this line was used as the standard for calibrating international time zones. Here it serves as a 'control baseline' to show changes in daylight as a result of the Earth's tilt and its orbit around the sun.
item.dc:creator: embeddedinrealityviaQED

item.title: Such evil
item.description: Politicians haven't condemned it, the relevant authorities have been mute about it. The agencies responsible for shipping these women to the Middle East with the promise of jobs and better living haven't been punished or even simply put to notice. I bet most of y'all hadn't even heard about it. This is soo f*d up.

item.title: It's time for TheFreePizzaDude!
item.description:
Hi everyone, we are TheFreePizzaAngels!
Last week we sent out 32 meals and 3 full grocery orders during this post Today we'll be here until 7pm central to do the whole thing over again!
Please remember to put your country in the request, it helps us better match you to an Angel. It's much easier for us to help requests in the US, but we will do our absolute best to pick up requests from any country.
Any questions? Just leave a comment! We'll be here for 6 hours helping as many people as we can
Let's take a closer look at how easy it is to be a Pizza Angel -
Simple as that! Tag me with any issues, or tag me once you've sent an order!
For anyone who would like to help, just not necessarily send food 1 on 1 - Anonymous Angels have been a huge help to this project through donations - https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude
8,189 meals since we started 506 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! Today's theme song https://youtu.be/dAmOkrRj2zk ... Today's Pizza Tally 125 1st, 2nd and 3rd by @OP 145 4th and 5th by @OP 207 6th and 7th by Pizza Angel @NoRoutesFound 215 8th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI 230 9th and 10th by Pizza Angel @NomadicPeach 235 11th and 12th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI 240 13th by Pizza Angel @ptothedubs 242 14th by Pizza Angel @Nihiladrem1 245 15th by Pizza Angel @pot314 249 16th and 17th by Pizza Angel @NoRoutesFound 252 18th by Pizza Angel @Cmbyrd0001 254 19th and 20th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI 300 21st by Pizza Angel @HillOfBeans 310 22nd, Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant by @OP 325 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @pot314 339 27th and 28th by Pizza Angel @sesamesnapsinhalf 358 29th, 30th and 31st by @OP 407 32nd and 33rd by Pizza Angel @SweetRage 420 Blaze It 34th by Pizza Angel @IndependentThoughtAlarm 422 35th by Pizza Angel @Aperfectstorm 430 36th by Pizza Angel @hotdognachos69 440 37th and 38th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI 455 39th, 40th and 41st by Pizza Angel @psychonoticon 520 The meaning of Life, the Universe, and everything by Pizza Angel @psychonoticon 530 43rd by Pizza Angel @MadamPuddifoot 550 44th and 45th by @OP 555 46th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI 605 47th by Pizza Angel @MrMcGibblettz 606 48th by Pizza Angel @Erutanmi 613 49th by Pizza Angel @Nannupcat 619 50th by Pizza Angel @turbovagina 638 51st by Pizza Angel @psychonoticon 648 52nd by Pizza Angel @libroocchio 651 53rd and 54th by Pizza Angel @pot314 653 55th by Pizza Angel @jiggidiggyman 657 56th by Pizza Angel @indomara 659 57th by Pizza Angel @maddoxonelung 700 58th and 59th by Pizza Angel @pot314 ... Today's Grocery Tally 420 Blaze It 1st by Grocery Angel @nefatProblemAnimal 603 2nd by Grocery Angel @Visco ... Alright everyone that's it for MrPuckett Had our biggest day in 4 months! Today we sent out 59 meals Filled 2 full grocery orders That's 8,246 meals since we started 508 grocery orders sent Hell of a post, see you all next week
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Forbidden Fruit - Mango Girl Update
item.description: Hello people of the internet! On Thursday I posted about a mango sized mass being removed from my ovary and figured I would provide an update. 1. They did not allow me to keep the mass and they didn’t give me photos either ☹️ I also lost the right ovary, which we knew was highly likely. 2. It was 3lbs, so about 1.3k jelly beans. 3. It is cancerous, they are currently calling it stage 1 ovary cancer. They’re running a week long test to see what the actual cancer breakdown is and if I’ll have to have chemo and/or other treatments. 4. I am in a lot of pain but the team here is trying to make me as comfortable as possible. 5. I really appreciate all the kind words and thoughts previously! Thank you everyone for your good vibes. If you have any more to spare this week please keep sending them! Hopefully no further treatment needed! #forbiddenfruit #donteatit #mango #tumor #cancer #fuckcancer
item.dc:creator: WorksInHotelDoesntTravel
